name: Infused Oil for Grilling Fish
recipeIngredient: 1/4 Lemon ;1/4 of 1 lemon peel, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a small bowl or jar.
2. Allow the mixture to stand at room temperature for a minimum of 2 hours.
3. Brush fish with the oil before grilling.
4. The infused oil will keep for several days when stored in the refrigerator.
